description: Neutral benchmark IR for Gemma-3-1B-shaped Doe runtime workloads with deterministic cache-backed non-zero synthetic weight assets.

scenarios.description: Single-block Gemma-3-1B-shaped prefill pass over 32 prompt tokens using Doe-owned retained inference kernels, explicit uniform/token buffer writes, and timed device loads for deterministic cache-backed synthetic readonly weights.
Single-token Gemma-3-1B-shaped decode step using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit cache/position uniform writes.
Single-run Gemma-3-1B-shaped inference sequence with a 64-token prefill phase and 64 sequential single-token decode phases using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit buffer writes.
